creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kai Knoblich from comment #5)

Only question: this depends (depended on) bug 259797. Will that be closed first, in order to close this, or is not actually a dependency in terms of how this ended up being resolved? If the latter, move bug 259797 from Depends on to See Also, otherwise leave and close both in order

Feel free to take and resolve, thank you Kai.
